title: NZ Family Holiday Planner — Personalised Trip Recommender
description: Tell us about your family — kids' ages, interests, how long you have — and get three personalised NZ holiday recommendations with activity picks and cost guides.
meta_desc: Get a personalised NZ family holiday plan in minutes. Tell us your family's ages and interests and we'll recommend the perfect destination with activities and cost estimates.
html_content:
Answer a few quick questions about your family and get three personalised NZ holiday recommendations — with activity picks, cost guides, and destination links.

Start planning →
